zh.lifeSummary: 當Mabel Malet於1195年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特時，她的父親William Malet Lord of Curry Mallet19歲，母親Alice Basset of Headington17歲。她於1218年與Hugh de Vivonne在英國薩默塞特修頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1249年10月16日之前在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mabel Malet于1195年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特时，她的父亲William Malet Lord of Curry Mallet19岁，母亲Alice Basset of Headington17岁。她于1218年与Hugh de Vivonne在英国薩默塞特修頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1249年10月16日之前在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Malet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: nickname from a diminutive of Mal ‘bad’ or from a derivative of the related Old French word maleit ‘accursed’ (see Mallet 1). Compare Malette .
French: from the Old French personal name Malet, a pet form of Malo (compare Mallet 2).

variants.name: Mal
meanings: Slovenian: nickname for a physically small man, from mal ‘small, little’.

variants.name: Malette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Gaston, Alphonse, Francois, Jacques, Rejean, Serge.
French: variant or feminine form of Malet and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this, reflecting the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

nameMeanings.name: Mabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a nickname from the Old French vocabulary word amabel, amable ‘lovely’ (akin to modern English amiable ‘friendly, good-humoured’). The initial vowel began to be lost as early as the 12th century (the same woman is referred to as both Mabilia and Amabilia in a document of 1185 ), but a short vowel in the resulting first syllable was standard, giving a rhyme with babble, until the 19th century, when people began to pronounce the name to rhyme with table.

en.lifeSummary: When Mabel Malet was born in 1195, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Malet Lord of Curry Mallet, was 19 and her mother, Alice Basset of Headington, was 17. She married Hugh de Vivonne in 1218, in Chewton, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died before 16 October 1249, in England, United Kingdom.

fr.Wells next the Sea, Norfolk, England: Wells next the Sea, Norfolk, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mabel Malet est née en 1195, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Malet Lord of Curry Mallet, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Alice Basset of Headington, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh de Vivonne en 1218, à Chewton, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée avant 16 octobre 1249, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mabel Malet 1195 in Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Malet Lord of Curry Mallet 19 und ihre Mutter Alice Basset of Headington 17. Sie hat 1218 in Chewton, Somerset, England Hugh de Vivonne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb vor 16. Oktober 1249 in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mabel Malet è nata il nel 1195 nel Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William Malet Lord of Curry Mallet, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Alice Basset of Headington, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Hugh de Vivonne nel 1218, nel Chewton, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 16 ottobre 1249, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Mabel Maletが1195年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトで生まれた時，父William Malet Lord of Curry Malletは19歳，母Alice Basset of Headingtonは17歳であった。1218年にイギリスソメルセトチェウトンでHugh de Vivonneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1249年10月16日以前にイギリスイギリスで死去した。

ko.Wells next the Sea, Norfolk, England: 영국 노르폴크 웰스 니스트 테 시
ko.lifeSummary: Mabel Malet(이)가 1195년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Malet Lord of Curry Mallet(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Basset of Headington(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1218년 영국 서머세트 체w턴에서 Hugh de Vivonne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1249년 10월 16일 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mabel Malet nasceu em 1195, em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Malet Lord of Curry Mallet, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Alice Basset of Headington, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh de Vivonne em 1218, em Chewton, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 16 de outubro de 1249, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Wells next the Sea, Norfolk, England: веллс некст т сеа, норфолк, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mabel Malet родилась в 1195 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Malet Lord of Curry Mallet было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Basset of Headington, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh de Vivonne в 1218 г. в местности чютон, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла перед 16 октябрь 1249 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания.
